mapper.select: SELECT id, type, name, avatar, create_time, last_message_time FROM chat_conversation WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_conversation (type, name, avatar, create_time, last_message_time) VALUES (#{type}, #{name}, #{avatar}, #{createTime}, #{lastMessageTime})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.type, c.name, c.avatar, c.create_time, c.last_message_time FROM chat_conversation c INNER JOIN chat_conversation_member m ON c.id = m.conversation_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.last_message_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_conversation SET last_message_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
